query:
-- Look for services with plan names that suggest bundles
SELECT 
  planName,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount,
  AVG(monthlyCost) as avgCost,
  MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost,
  MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost,
  costSource,
  billingPlatform
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%bundle%' OR 
  planName LIKE '%Bundle%' OR
  planName LIKE '%pack%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Pack%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Legal%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Compliance%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Medical%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Essential%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Professional%'
)
AND billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
GROUP BY planName, costSource, billingPlatform
ORDER BY serviceCount DESC
LIMIT 40;

-- Look for services with plan names that suggest bundles
SELECT 
  planName,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount,
  AVG(monthlyCost) as avgCost,
  MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost,
  MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost,
  costSource,
  billingPlatform
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%bundle%' OR 
  planName LIKE '%Bundle%' OR
  planName LIKE '%pack%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Pack%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Legal%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Compliance%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Medical%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Essential%' OR
  planName LIKE '%Professional%'
)
AND billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
GROUP BY planName, costSource, billingPlatform
ORDER BY serviceCount DESC
LIMIT 40;
